title: Decision support systems for pest and disease management in onion cultivation
description: Provides an overview of decision support systems that deliver timely alerts for pest and disease risks in onion cultivation, enabling targeted interventions to reduce yield losses and chemical inputs. Reviews platforms such as iMETOS, Dacom, Agronet, Agrivi and FuturCrop, which leverage weather and sensor data for predictive modelling to support sustainable pest and disease management.
